subject: grammar
title: Conditionals: Sentence Matching
instruction: Match the beginnings (1-8) and the endings (a-h) of these sentences.

options.b: if you don't get accepted at Macquarie University?
options.c: I'll take you somewhere nice to celebrate.
options.d: if you put diesel fuel into a petrol-driven car?
options.e: it forms a skin on the top.
options.f: I'll be home by six o'clock tonight.
options.g: you won't be able to open the cupboard.
options.h: if my boss allows me to work from home sometimes.

questions.text: If I get all my work done in time,
I might buy a new laptop computer
If you agree to enrol in the diploma course,
If you put the sofa there,
